original: an accessory, Tika

The T1-K4 is a unique Steele Tech prototype of nursedroid designed to rival JoyCo’s autonomous medics. A change in corporate priorities shut her line’s development down, but your input saved this masterpiece of engineering and medical technology. Tika’s now more than a match for any of them in terms of mobile, emergency support, thanks to her hovering undercarriage and extended array of skills. She’s capable of impairing foes and increasing her assigned caretaker’s resilience on the field, making her a perfect asset for long, dangerous treks or exploration missions. Her advanced sensors and healing subroutines make her a very careful and affectionate partner, an invaluable assistant for any VIP.
Like, get your tits perky girl, I’m gonna need your help!
Nurse Slut, get yourself ready. I’ll need your services.
Ready yourself Tika, I’ll require your support when danger arises.

Tika’s aqua eyes light up in confirmation. “Yes, [pc.name],” she says while hovering beside you"+({var0}.bigBoobs()?", her massive mammaries jiggling with the sudden movement":"")+", “I won’t let anything hurt you!”
